_comment: Funding Pips 5K Account — Hardcoded Compliance Parameters

risk_per_trade._note: 1% of $5000 = $50 hard cap per trade. NEVER exceed this.

daily_limits._note: Kill-switch fires at -$225 (4.5%), leaving 0.5% buffer before Funding Pips hard 5% limit

position_rules._note: 10-min cooldown after SL hit, same symbol+direction

consistency_rules._note: Phase 1 target = 8% of 5K = $400. Max single trade profit = $240. Max daily = $140

weekend_rules._note: All positions closed by Friday 21:00 UTC (Friday ~2:30 AM IST)

activity_keepalive._note: Prevents account dormancy. Opens 0.01 lot, holds 185s (>180s compliance), closes. Fully within Funding Pips rules.
